title: vskill CLI — Install / Enable / Disable Skills (Claude Code wiring)
description: Extend the vskill CLI to fully manage the lifecycle of skills on a developer's machine: install, enable, disable, list status, and integrate with Claude Code's skills directory (~/.claude/skills/ or project-local .claude/skills/). Existing commands (add, remove, find, list, pin, marketplace, outdated) handle catalog operations; the gap is the activation surface — once a skill is installed, can the user toggle it on/off per-project or globally without manual config edits? The new commands should write/remove the appropriate plugin/skill registration so Claude Code picks it up on next restart, mirroring `claude plugin install/enable/disable` semantics where applicable, with clear feedback on which agent surfaces (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, etc.) each operation affected.

scope.primaryAudience: developers using vskill CLI to manage skills on their workstation

outOfScope: vskill-platform marketing site, cloud-side skill provisioning, OAuth, billing changes
